claims.statement: For positive concern weights and an active capacity budget, the positive-price KKT solution scales as rho*(x) proportional to w(x)^(d/(d+2)).
Value of information is expected error reduction, MAE_now minus MAE_after, not the reverse difference.
The frozen E5 design establishes generator-level generalization beyond labeled coverage.
The E6 confirmatory replication is not adjudicated because its frozen smoke gate is blocked.
Weakness-to-generalization causality transfers to external models under the current external-contact design.
Passive-to-active results support a load-bearing, perturbation-resistant controller but do not establish an attractor basin or return dynamics.

The seven registered theorem-bridge assumption families have executable satisfying examples and paired cases where the named assumption or bridge predicate fails; this audit does not establish theorem necessity, conclusion invalidation, or minimality.
Current error, posterior variance, error squared over K plus one, or mutual information universally rank probes by true expected regret reduction.
Three independent seeds provide promotion-ready uncertainty across the registered independent, hierarchical, null, and high-noise regimes.
The registered mass-normalized dose-response score distinguishes a known causal feature from equally decodable-only and null features across synthetic commitment surfaces.
Action coupling produces a reproducible discontinuous bifurcation across the registered order parameters, architectures, and seeds.
Matched-budget forward and reverse continuation exhibit registered path dependence that survives washout and clears reinitialization controls in the synthetic passive-active model.
